photos.author: boxofchocolates
photos.ocrText:
Parallelism techniques
Tensor parallelism Split matmul across GPUs,good for GEMMs
Data parallelism Split batch across GPus,good for attention
Pipeline parallelism Split model forward pipeline steps across GPus Prefill/decode disaggregation is, IMO,a special case
Expertparallelism Split MoE experts across GPUs,good for group GEMMs
Context parallelism Split sequence across GPUs, stillnew (to Oss)
Modal

title: Google Photos Slides: Knowledge Agents
evidence: OCR repeatedly discusses knowledge work, tools, organization, DeepResearch, MixedbreadSearch, BM25, and orchestrated research.
Photo timing matches the Day 2 Search and Retrieval session block for Benjamin Clavie's talk.

relatedTalks.title: If we want them to do Knowledge Work, we need to design Knowledge Agents

photos.author: boxofchocolates
photos.ocrText:
But... What Even is Knowledge Work?
Knowledge work is all work where the main input is information and the main output is a (broadly) actionable judgement.
a knowledge problem,you probably need search. It's tautological with retrieval: if you need search, it's likely a knowledge problem, and if it's
Each knowledge industry has contributed to the ever-improving structuring of knowledgework... Doctors, Actuaries, etc... all perform knowledge work on a daily basis. In thereal world,it iseverywhere:awyers,Academics,SoftwareEngineers,Paralegals,
But agents have focused on a special case: software engineering.

photos.author: boxofchocolates
photos.ocrText:
Code is Knowledge, but Knowledge isn't Code
Code Has Unique Features Knowledge Work is Broader
1 Durable clues greppable Narrow, surface 12 13 14 16 /src/app/main.py raise ValueErr forpinpeople: StringIo.seek sortPeople HashMap::new ifkey in cache: key=sortPeople（p return cache[key] d method #identifier API <1> match exact works things implicit Meaningis different The same clue can mean noticewindow deadine 30days retentionrule graceperiod
Tasksare pre-cut already Fix crash on login #1234 TICKET make no mistakes login page, Add beautiful #5678 FEATURE Searchstarts fromintent dutytoprevent 'the part where theft"
Codehas logical,stableidentifiers. Non-code knowledge isoften contextual and meaning-driven.
米Runlayer

photos.author: boxofchocolates
photos.ocrText:
KnowledgeWork Is Two Self-Optimising Loops
More knowledge →harder to find/use → better tools →more people can produce/use knowledge → more knowledge 1.THE TOOL LOOP
Writing,archives, written cultures Oral /early scribes Alexandria catalogues Pinakes/ Scriptoria, copying, Monasteries preservation Indexes,bibliographies, Early modern/ industrial age Late 19th century Dewey +universal bibliography associative indexing Memex/ 1945 Web → AI era Search engines, AI systems ranking,
y yyysdsdspspsopfoudm gathers,interpets, 2.THE ORGANISATION LOOP Lone expert One person records Scribes&clerks record-keeping Thinking and separate Monastic scriptoria Copying, correcting, organised labour storing-berore Universities/guilds Training,ranking, credentialing professions institutional memory Bureaucracies procedures, Files,forms, Each new tool makes somekind of knowledge work cheaper. Partner associate→ analyst→assistant services firms Professional Judgment vs research, documents,process Paralegals/ assistants
8888
Organisation changes who does what in knowledge work.

photos.author: boxofchocolates
photos.ocrText:
Loop, Running Self-Optimising For Centuries Work Is Actually Just One Knowledge 4.RETRAINING & absorb knowledge to produce and Raises capacity KNOWLEDGE WORK REORGANIZED Workers adapt, specialize,and use the tools 1.NEW New findings, information, reinforces itself. KNOWLEDGE methods The loop 人 人 Too much knowledge to absorb by hand 2. NEED FoR BETTER TOOLS More knowledge to process
both organisation and tooling To deal with the specificities of knowledge,we've developed workflows,and Changes jobs, training WORKFLOWS & ROLES Software,automation, 3.NEW TooLS, organizing work new ways of Drives invention and adoption
